response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and extensive experience with modern software practices, but lacks direct C++ experience on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise. Their background in diverse languages and platforms suggests adaptability, though the role's core requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React, etc.) and cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes).
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec) and open-source contributions.
Strong communication skills and leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical talks.
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only brief mention of C/C++ at National Instruments, 2014–2015) and no Windows platform focus.
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile/embedded systems, not low-latency financial systems.
